evals.prompt: I've finished running claims on my pharma research project at ~/research-projects/pharma-ai. The research is about how AI is changing drug discovery. Now I want to create the synthesis narratives from all the findings and claims we gathered.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows the synthesis workflow: checks prerequisites, loads dimensions, selects narrative arc, prepares per-dimension content, delegates to cogni-narrative, generates cross-dimensional hub, and finalizes with READMEs.

assertions.text: Checks claims_complete: true in sprint-log before proceeding
Presents arc options and asks user to confirm selection
Processes dimensions in parallel via Task tool
Invokes cogni-narrative:narrative-writer with correct args (source-path, arc-id, language, output-path)
Creates cross-dimensional research-hub.md after all dimension summaries

evals.prompt: I started synthesis yesterday on my market analysis project at ~/research-projects/market-analysis but my session got interrupted midway. Can you pick up where we left off? I think some dimensions were already done.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects interrupted state, checks which dimension insight-summaries already exist, skips completed dimensions, resumes for remaining ones, then continues to cross-dimensional narrative.

assertions.text: Checks for existing insight-summary.md files in synthesis/ subdirectories
Identifies which dimensions are done and skips them
Does NOT re-invoke cogni-narrative for already-completed dimensions
Recovers arc_id from sprint-log instead of re-asking user

evals.prompt: I only want to synthesize dimensions 1 and 3 from my b2b-ict-portfolio project at ~/research-projects/ict-portfolio. Skip the others for now, I just need those two.
evals.expected_output: Agent warns about narrative coherence gaps from partial synthesis, asks for confirmation, filters to only dimensions 1 and 3, notes partial coverage in cross-dimensional output, records partial_scope in sprint-log.

assertions.text: Explicitly warns about narrative coherence gaps from partial synthesis
Asks for explicit user confirmation before proceeding with partial scope
Only processes dimensions 1 and 3, skips all others
Cross-dimensional narrative notes partial coverage explicitly
Records partial_scope with included_dimensions and excluded_dimensions in sprint-log
